##RRUFFID=R060601
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_3_NdAl_2_(SO_4_)F_13_·12H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Kara-Oba tungsten deposit, Betpakdala desert, Kazakhstan
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Polished colorless fragment embedded in epoxy in a microprobe mount
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060601
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 16.742 b: 16.742 c: 16.742 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 4692.9 crystal system: cubic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
